message:
Modernize Option checks with is_none_or and fix query.rs formatting

Replace map_or(true, |x| pred) pattern with the more readable is_none_or(pred)
method introduced in Rust 1.82:

- run_export(): timestamp range tracking for session bounds
- run_export_html(): same pattern for HTML export
- run_mappings_test(): best match selection for path mappings

Also fixes formatting in query.rs where the return type signature was
awkwardly wrapped.

The is_none_or() method reads more naturally: "if none or (condition)" vs
the inverted logic of map_or.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
